description: PHASE 6: Meter Readings with AI OCR - Backend meter reading API with Google Vision integration, and frontend upload/approval pages. Covers TASK-016 and TASK-016B.
steps: Create backend/app/models/meter.py with models: MeterReadingSubmit, MeterReadingApprove, MeterReadingResponse, MeterHistoryResponse

Create backend/app/services/ocr_service.py with: ocr_meter_image(image_bytes) using Google Vision TEXT_DETECTION, parse numbers with regex for 4-7 digit meter values, estimate_confidence based on number count and validity, return detected_value/confidence/raw_text

Create backend/app/services/meter_service.py with: upload_reading (validate unit, upload to Supabase Storage, call OCR, create record), list_readings (filter unit/type/month/approved), approve_reading (set manual_override or use AI value, calculate consumption), get_unit_meter_history (12 months)
Create backend/app/routers/meters.py with: POST /meter-readings/upload (multipart), GET /meter-readings, GET /meter-readings/{id}, PATCH /meter-readings/{id}/approve, GET /units/{id}/meter-history
Create frontend/src/types/meter.ts with MeterReading, MeterHistory interfaces
Create frontend/src/pages/meters/MeterReadingListPage.tsx with month picker, table with approval status badges, inline approve button
Create frontend/src/pages/meters/MeterUploadPage.tsx with meter type selection, previous reading input, image upload (drag-drop + camera capture on mobile), preview, loading state during OCR

Create frontend/src/components/meter/OCRResultCard.tsx showing image on left, AI-detected value on right (large font), confidence bar, editable input pre-filled with AI value, confirm button, warning banner if confidence < 0.6
Create frontend/src/components/meter/MeterHistoryChart.tsx using Recharts LineChart with 2 lines (electricity + water) over 12 months, hover tooltip with consumption + cost
acceptance_criteria: OCR service parses meter images and returns detected values with confidence scores
Approval endpoint calculates consumption correctly (current - previous reading)
Upload page shows camera capture option on mobile
OCRResultCard displays warning when confidence is below 0.6
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "from app.routers.meters import router; from app.services.ocr_service import ocr_meter_image; print('OK')"
